title: Logitech Wireless Mouse M525 - Red/Black
description:
Product Description
With micro-precise scrolling, ultra-smooth cursor control and super-long-and-reliable battery power, the compact Logitech Wireless Mouse M525 screams control-and personal style in your choice of sweet color combinations. System Requirements: Windows XP Windows Vista Windows 7 Windows 8 Windows 10|Mac OS X 10.5 or later|Linux kernel 2.6+|USB port|Internet access.
From the Manufacturer
Features
Compare
Which Logitech Wireless Mouse is right for you?
Create The Combo That Works For You
Logitech has a range of products that you can connect via a single, tiny Unifying receiver you leave plugged in to your notebook. Mix. Match. Unify. Now you can create your perfect laptop workstation, wherever you work.
features: Micro-precision scroll wheel: Faster, easier web navigation plus advanced optical sensor for smooth tracking on more surfaces, USB receiver is stored inside the mouse where the batteries are located
Extended battery life: Go for up to three years without a battery change (Battery life may vary based on user and computing conditions)
Compact comfort in cool colors: Ergonomic shape, soft rubber grips and great style that's easy to take anywhere
Multi-device wireless receiver: Tiny Unifying receiver connects up to six Unifying-compatible devices
For Windows and Mac computers: Works with Windows XP, Vista, 7 and Mac OS X 10.5 or later
Receiver Dimensions (HxWxD): 0.57in (14.4mm) x 0.74in (18.7mm) x 0.24in (6.1mm); Receiver Weight: 0.06oz (1.8g)

reviews.title: Perfect Replacement For M505
reviews.text: My M505 finally quit working dependably for me after nearly 3 years of dedicated service. I loved the design and how I never had to change the batteries, not even once in those 3 years. So I sought out another one only to find they are no longer made. But I did discover this M525 and after a little research I purchased. I am extremely happy with this newer version of my older mouse. It is nearly identical to my M505, so close in fact that I have yet to notice any major differences except for the color. I recommend this M525 to anyone who likes the freedom of a wireless mouse and doesn't want to bother with changing batteries!

reviews.title: It's great.
reviews.text: for my computer.

reviews.title: Love the way it scrolls!
reviews.text: Very satisfied with the purchase. Operation is smooth and well controlled.

reviews.title: Good product!
reviews.text: Good product, pleased!

reviews.title: Decent mouse
reviews.text: This is a fairly good mouse.  Its one flaw is the battery receiver compartment.  The lid feels flimsy and pops up if the mouse falls off my desk but when you go to open it the release on the bottom and it doesn't release easily.

title: VssoPlor Wireless Mouse, 2.4G Slim Portable Computer Mice with Nano Receiver for Notebook, PC, Laptop, Computer (Mint Green to Purple)
features: LOW POWER CONSUMPTION: Intelligent sleep mode can better extend battery life. It will enter auto sleep mode if you don't use it for 5 minutes to save battery and need to click it, the mouse will enter working mode again

STABLE CONNECTION: 2.4 GHz wireless provides stronger anti-interference ability, a faster transmission speed and a more reliable connection, working distances can up to 15 m, and high DPI can make it track more smoothly over most surfaces
WIDE COMPATIBILITY:Well compatible with Windows7/8/10/XP, Vista, Mac OS X 10.4 etc. Fits for desktop, laptop, PC, Macbook and other devices

ERGONOMIC & COMPACT DESIGN: USB-receiver stays in your PC USB port or stows conveniently inside the wireless mouse when not in use. The lightweight and simple features make the mouse perfect for the journey, office, home
WHISPER & SENSITIVE CLICKING: Smooth frosted surface and quiet clicks can bring a better user experience and free your worry about bothering others and keep you stay focused while working

reviews.title: Very Nice
reviews.text:
Very nice. Looks good, I like the gold edging more than I thought I would. A little small, but I barely notice. The mouse I WAS using was HUGE, and my entire palm rested on it. This one only covers ⅔ of my palm.

Very comfortable.

Have not played anything that could be considered a stress test. I like that you can turn it off, but I dislike that you have to remember to turn it off.

I cannot tell if it goes to sleep.

reviews.title: wireless mouse
reviews.text: My old wireless finally died - dropped too many times onto the hardwood floor.  I purchased one that was like the old one and this one.  This one is flatter.  I ended up choosing to use this one.  It loaded quickly and is very comfortable to use.  Very, very quiet click - almost silent.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text: This is a good value for the cost.  If you need something small and easy to carry around with you this is great. Especially right now I am between working from home but sometimes have to visit the office and the less and smaller items I carry, the better!  This is nice and slim and works great with my laptop.  I don't really like to use batteries but as long as you switch it off when not in use you will be able to get quite a bit of use out of one.

reviews.title: Loses Connection CONSTANTLY
reviews.text: I have to turn it off and on about 5x a day because it randomly loses connectivity. When I am using it or idle for less than 1 min.

reviews.title: Good So Far
reviews.text: Easy to install.  Nice color. Has on off switch with usb inside by battery.

title: 2 Sets of Hyperslides Rounded Curved Edges Mouse Feet, Mouse Skates, Pads for Logitech G305, G304 Lightspeed Wireless Gaming Mouse Feet Replacement (0.8mm, Smooth, Pure PTFE) Pro Performance Upgrade
features: ✔️ [High Quality] Replacement mouse feet that increases your control and accuracy by providing the smoothest and most consistent slide
✔️ [Buttery Smooth] Having a smoother slide helps reduce grip tension which improves accuracy and decreases wrist strain for longer and more enjoyable gaming or work sessions
✔️ [Exclusionary Tech] Our exclusive technology produces rounded edges for a scratch-free slide right out of the package; no break-in period required
✔️ [Meticulous Design] Specially calibrated 0.80 mm thickness: Provides the ideal feet height that eliminates "bottom-scraping" & provides longer life-span
✔️ [Longevity] We include 2 sets made of 100% virgin grade PTFE material for the lowest friction and eco-friendly, 3M no-residue adhesive

reviews.title: Solid Replacement
reviews.text: I was looking for replacement feet for my mouse. And I stumbled upon these. I was skeptical at first, but upon arrival I put them to the test. They feel better than the original and easy to install. Material felt good and quality was good.

title: Aproca Hard Travel Storage Case for Logitech MX Master 3 / 2S Wireless Mouse (Dark Blue-Upgrade)

Perfect Fit: Specially designed for Logitech MX Master 3 / 2S Wireless Mouse.

Convenient Design: Comfortable hand grip for easy portability,Comes with specially mesh pocket for other accessories,Smooth but strong double zipper are easy for opening and closing, giving you a better using experience.

Great Protection: The Case is semi-waterproof,anti-static, shockproof, Stylish and Durable,prevents any damages or scratches caused by accidentally bumping,dropping, secures the device in good condition on travelling or outdoors.
For sale is case only(device and accessories are not included).

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: Big and spacious for the mouse and extras.

reviews.title: A beautiful case for a beautiful mouse.
reviews.text: well built with quality zippers and sturdy construction material. The mouse fits snuggly and doesn't rattle around when the case is zipped. Comes with a few carabiners to help secure it in a laptop bag- appreciate the thinking that went into that. Might take up more space than admirable in smaller laptop bags, but its worth protecting the investment.

reviews.title: Great Case
reviews.text: This is a great case. I especially like that it had a safe secure spot for the Bluetooth dongle. My last Bluetooth mouse broke because I used to just toss it loosely into my bag and it got all banged up. This case form fits my mouse and seems very sturdy.

reviews.title: Good fit for my mouse
reviews.text: Good quality case

reviews.title: Good Protection
reviews.text: Good protection but too large for cover the mouse.

reviews.title: Mouse doesn't work
reviews.text: Mouse does not work. Even tried to get it work with a laptop.

reviews.title: Very pleased so far
reviews.text: I haven't really explored it in depth but it installed firefox with no trouble and lets me use the sites that my main work laptop no longer will (Windows xp because I'm locked into legacy software). I don't game or stream much so can't comment there. Battery life seems ok for a couple of days intermittent use. Hope to try out more stuff when less busy.

reviews.title: awesome mouse, awesome vendor!
reviews.text: mouse was delivered a little earlier than expected, which is great! corsair is a highly trusted brand and the last one we had, same model, lasted a good 3 years before the stroller wheel gave out. there probably is a way to just clean the wheel, but we just got a new mouse and intend on keeping the old one. it has extremely smooth dpi and motion with a nicely weighted feel. good solid unit!

reviews.title: Good FPS mouse
reviews.text: The materials wear really easily but it was perfect for my build and is light enough for the games I play, love the dpi buttons

reviews.title: double click problem after only 6 months
reviews.text: Bought this 6 months ago, now 6 months later I'm having this "double left click" problem. I thought this issue is rare, turned out it's extremely popular with this new Corsair mouse. My last 2 Corsair mice lasted 12 years, this one is garbage. Do not buy this unless you plan on doing RMA with Corsair while waiting 30 days for them to replace your mouse like I am right now. Extremely frustrating. If you don't believe me, search for all other corsair mice, they all have low 4 star reviews with double left click problems.

title: Wireless Mouse 2.4G Ergonomic Vertical Optical Mouse with Nano Receiver,4 Adjustable DPI 800/ 1200/ 1600/2400,Rechargeable Li-Battery,6 Buttons for Computer,Notebook, PC, Laptop, MacBook(Black)
description:
Ergonomic Design
Tired of using the traditional grip? Take a break from overly-clunky or uncomfortably tiny mice. The ergonomically-designed thumb rests and grips fit the contour of your palm for maximum comfort.
Easy-access use
Six buttons give you improved control over your computer's systems. Whether dragging and dropping, selecting large volumes of data, or casually gaming, this mouse provides a low-cost, effective solution for multiple computing needs.
Why Choose Us?
All Our Products are Produced under Strict Quality Inspection 30 Day Money-back Guarantee and 3-year limited hardware warranty Professional After-Sales Team to Make Things Right within 24hrs

The side buttons are not available for Mac OS because the system itself is a closed one, not open to the public, but the other function can be used normally.
Specifications:
Material: ABS Key number: 6 Buttons Resolution:800-1200-1600-2400DPI( One key switch) Wireless technology: 2.4GHz Operational range: 10m~15m/33ft~50ft Battery capacity: 650mAh rechargeable Li-Battery (built-in) Charging time: 2-3hours  Operation voltage: 3.7v  Operation current: <5mA Weight: 3.3oz/93g Dimensions: 4.05x 2.76x 2.75in/103x 70x57mm  Suitable for:Right handed,Programmer,Office staff,Student,internet surfers, gamers and people who work at length at the computer Compatibility: Windows 8 / 7 / 10/ Vista / XP / 2000, Linux, Android; Mac OS X (NOTE: 1.The two thumb buttons are not recognized on the Mac OS X; 2.This wireless mouse is not compatible with Mac OS X El Capitan).

1x ifun Wireless Vertical Ergonomic Optical Mouse 1x 2.4G USB Nano receiver 1x Charging Cable
features: Built-in Rechargeable Li-Battery with Auto-sleep Function:The iFun Wireless Mouse has 650mA battery capacity,only about 3 hours full charging time needed and support 720 hours working.Enters power saving mode automatically after 8 minutes idle,press any button can wake it up,conserves power and extends product life.If the mice lack of power,connect the charging cable,then it can work simultaneously

Scientific Ergonomic Design with Next/Previous Buttons:Contoured shape, sweat-resistant ,skin-friendly finish,added next/previous buttons to browse web page faster,sturdy scroll wheel with rubber oil coating that prevents fingers from sliding,the ergonomic computer mouse allow for natural hand positioning and ultimate comfort. It eases tension on the wrist and hand for right-handed users.Encourages healthy natural "handshake" wrist and arm positions for smoother movement and less overall strain

4 Adjustable DPI Levels:800,1200,1600,2400, easily change the cursor sensitivity depending on your activity. Resolution Optical Tracking Technology provides more sensitivity than standard optical mice for smooth and precise tracking on a wide range of surfaces.Best for things that require precision like color correcting and photo edits or make it faster for browsing

Plug-and-play and Wide Compatibility:Comes with a USB Nano receiver, plug and play directly.2.4GHz wireless technology ensure longer working distance-up to 33ft in 360 degree with no interference.Well compatible with Mac OS X, Linux and all versions of Windows such as Windows7/8/10/XP etc. Fits for desktop, laptop, PC, Macbook and other devices
Warranty:We support 30 Day Money-back Guarantee and 3-year limited hardware warranty,feel free to contact with us,our service team are always ready to support

reviews.title: Love this mouse
reviews.text: Great color selection. Fits my hand well.

reviews.title: I'll never go back to a flat mouse
reviews.text: I was suffering from tennis elbow for months, badly, and nothing I did was making any difference.  I have a job typing about 10 hours a day, eight days a week:/ and did some research about posture and what could cause this.  Already had an ergo keyboard, so I bought this ergo mouse.  WOW.  Unbelievable how almost immediately the tennis elbow cleared up.  This was super easy to get use to.  I have small hands, and the size is perfect.  I will never use a flat mouse again.  So very glad I stumbled upon this.  Best money I've ever spent.  Oh, and I absolutely love the fact that I do not have to replace batteries every week!

reviews.title: Well designed mouse, nothing like it
reviews.text: I love picking out a color I will enjoy looking at, other than basic black or white mice. I wanted the blue one forever, and years ago I got one in pink instead of blue per their mistake. I just kept it. I used it and yes it still works, I really wanted the blue one so I took my time to look for another one just like it and yes it is hard to find this blue color. Beautiful. The fit is very smooth and soft and perfect, they know what hands like to rest in a cupped shape and this is comfortable to work with. The glide is excellent and can be used for everyday, office, or gaming. Take a look around at other styles but you will not find one that fits like this ergonomically for the price which you cannot beat. The best part is that it is rechargeable and yes it comes with the cord and also you can use it while it is charging. Keep your wrist happy and get one.

reviews.title: Great ergonomic feel!
reviews.text: This is a great wireless mouse! It has been wonders to my carpel tunnel on my hand and love the natural feel of this. All computer mouses should be made like this, it just makes sense when you first use it. Anyways, seems pretty sturdy and have had no complaints since receiving it. Smooth trailing, battery seems to last long and love that it goes to sleep mode when not in use. Also, love the color; it's exactly as pictured!

reviews.title: Nice. But too small...
reviews.text:
I normally use medium sized gloves. sometimes small.

This mouse was designed for smaller hands than mine.

It's a nice mouse. small, cheap, comfortable, works well. the scroll wheel was really fun to use. but it didn't work for my case.

title: LED Bluetooth Mouse for Laptop iPad MacBook pro Wireless Mouse for Laptop MacBook Air Mac Chromebook
description: Packing list: Instructions x1, LED charging Bluetooth + 2.4G dual-mode wireless mouse x1, 2.4g Nano USB wireless receiver x1(hidden in the slot at the bottom of the mouse), USB charging line x1, USB C-type adapter x1, packing box x1, How to connect to a laptop using bluetooth mode:  Turn on the Bluetooth switch at the bottom of the mouse > open the computer system Settings > open Bluetooth >when the computer bluetooth display is looking for nearby bluetooth devices, find the "BT5.1 mouse", click the connection, and then successfully connected, you can use the mouse. How to connect to iPad Pro/iPad Air/ Mini/ iPhone (ios 13/ios 14) via Bluetooth Mouse  first slide the button at the bottom of the mouse to the bluetooth " " position. ( bluetooth mode.) (1) open ipad Settings >Accessibility > Touch > AssistiveTouch > Click to open （An auxiliary dot will appear on the screen）(2) Go back to Settings > Click on the bluetooth > Click to open > BT 5.1 MOUSE > connect and Pair.（PIN:0000)  🔋How to Charge Wireless Mouse? 🔋When the pointer of your mouse does not move or cannot be used, or suddenly disconnects continuously in use, you need to charge it for about 3 hours. Please use the USB port of your computer to charge it, or use an adapter with an output of no more than 5v to charge it
features: 🖱💻🖥📱BEST COMPATIBLE BLUETOOTH 5.1 CHIP: Compatible with more than 99.8% Bluetooth devices. This bluetooth mouse is suitable for all laptops with bluetooth function or ipad iPhone with iOS13 or above
💡 7-color LED mouse: After the mouse is successfully connected to your computer/laptop/iPad device, the 7-color LED starts to light one by one.
✅BUILT-IN BATTERY: Built-in battery,easy to charge by micro usb cable,no more need for extra AAA battery.please please keep the mouse power switch in "ON" position when charging .

✅ERGONOMIC DESIGN： Good surface coating technology given you a skin-like touch feeling. User-friendly design provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and pocket-sized perfect for travel, Mute design keeps away annoying clicks.

✅AUTO ENERGY-SAVINGSLEEPING MODE: Li-polymer batteries,high cycle life.the Auto Switch Off function will help you save energy as your bluetooth mouse will switch off when your PC is turned off or the receiver is disconnected. If you do not use the mouse for eight minutes, it will go to sleeping mode, you can press the any button to weak it up.

reviews.title: Bad product
reviews.text: It worked for a bit and then it just wouldn’t move ni matter if I charged it. Not happy

reviews.title: Lightweight and smooth.
reviews.text: Clicks easily and slides on mouse pad smoothly. A bit frustrating that it goes into sleep mode after a short time when I’m busy elsewhere but ease of use makes it okay. You need to be careful putting in the charger since the mouse is lightweight. And I love the pink color!

reviews.title: I like it
reviews.text: I like most of things to be wireless, and I really like this mouse because I have yet to have an issue with the bluetooth connection. I will say that you do have to push a bit harder to click the mouse than I am normally used to, but it's negligible and ultimately didn't bother me. I like the lights on it, and the side of the mouse works great for me (although it's a bit small for someone with big hands). I would buy again.

reviews.title: Goes to sleep when you need it the most
reviews.text: Won't stay connected to my laptop and goes to sleep.  Have to power cycle to get it to work again.  Even tried leaving the USB cable plugged in and it still goes to sleep.

reviews.title: Looks expensive but feels cheap
reviews.text:
The included USB charging line does not fit snug. Feels like an aftermarket adapter and felt as if the mouse would break is pushed all the way in or pulled out. Time will tell if the charging line lasts. I'll update as time goes on.

It has the feel of a toy but the girls in the house are already asking for one like it, so pretty sells. Color is towards the green scale but works well with seafoam colors.

reviews.title: Glitches
reviews.text: I got this mouse because I left my good mouse at a friend's house, who I won't see for a month. I guess you get what you pay for because I've been working for about 2 hours and I've had to take the battery out to reset 5 times. The mouse icon just stops moving. At first I thought it happened when I was typing and went to move it again and it went to sleep, because the light went off. But it just stops mid move on a screen. It's almost better to just use the laptop track pad. I would not recommend

reviews.title: SAVE YOUR MONEY
reviews.text: .This mouse lasted maybe a week with the very light use that I gave it. The metal wheel no longer moves. I liked that it was quiet compared to my old one, but it should have lasted much longer

reviews.title: Love it.
reviews.text: I love the feel, easy to use and it looks good. Will recommend and purchase again.

reviews.title: It broke
reviews.text: Scroll button stopped working but before that is was okay

reviews.title: Mouse

reviews.title: Beware: eats batteries
reviews.text: I bought 2 of these wireless mouses for all the reasons the higher ratings posted here mention. I am now in the market for replacements because I  am tired of replacing the battery in each of them every 2 months. I have never had this problem with a mouse before.

reviews.title: nice mouse
reviews.text: it's a mouse, it's wireless. it's Logitech.

reviews.title: Nice!
reviews.text: Bought this for our 10 year old daughter who is doing virtual school and it has been great so far! This mouse has outlasted several wired once she had before and she loves the pink!

reviews.title: Love it.
reviews.text: Does everything I expected it to do with no glitches. My grand daughter loves the pink color LOL. Cool Mouse.

reviews.title: Interferes with cable box.
reviews.text: As a mouse it works fine, but it interferes with cable box.  We couldn't understand why the sound kept going off.  we removed the mouse from the room and problem solved.

title: NORMIA RITA Foldable Arc Wireless Mouse Silent Click Bluetooth 2.4GHz Dual Modes Portable Curved Mouse for Home, Office, Travel (Silver)
features: Ergonomic Mouse: Fits hands curve, arc design. Takes small space after rotate, lightweight and mini (size: 4.6"*2.3"*0.3") compact design occupies less space of your desk. A perfect fit for your hand and your mobile lifestyle. Please check the image about how to connect with the mouse.

2.4GHz & Bluetooth 4.0 dual mode: This creatively and conveniently designed mouse,can work on TWO DEVICES, connecting one device through Bluetooth and the other via RF 2.4Ghz. If you are annoying that you have to own one Bluetooth mouse and one 2.4G wireless mouse separately for your laptop and tablet, or laptop and laptop, or laptop and desktop, this mouse is your ideal choice. You could intelligently switch the mode between both devices just by a click

High Performance & Quiet Operation: Upgraded optical sensor, smooth and fast response offer you a better on-line time. Left and right buttons silent design make you work or play in a quiet environment, won’t disturb others when you at home or in the office

reviews.title: Works well, light, easy.
reviews.text: This works really well, I do wish it had a little bit more weight to it.  I use the surface mouse generally and love it.  I bought this as a replacement bc I transitioned my surface mouse to my work computer. This works similarly well, it’s just so light it doesn’t feel as sturdy.  It won’t work with 2 devices at once, you have to keep switching, but does have multiple ways to connect.

reviews.title: Sharp, poor cursor control, poor scrolling
reviews.text: I had hoped, for this price, I might get something that worked...NOT!  The edges are sharp and very uncomfortable.  If you have tiny hands, this might work.  Scrolling is pretty much a bumpy ride, all or nothing, no matter how you set the scroll.  The cursor was very hard to control and very hard to get it in the right place.  Yes, I played with mouse settings and tried to tweak but no go.

reviews.title: Awesome Bluetooth function and great price!
reviews.text: After ordering two other “blue tooth” mice and having to return them both when they were dependent on a USB port, this one came through with flying colors and was cheaper than the first two I had to buy and return!!

What I didn't like about it is:

I didn't use it in time to return it so I am stuck with it. I think I may have to try and file it down.

reviews.text: Leadsail is my go to brand for quality computer mice.  This is the fifth one I have gotten and they all work flawlessly. What I look for is design, function and durability and you get that with all Leadsail products.  Recommend.

Note: If your computer is Type-C port, please insert the USB-C to USB receiver into the Type-c port of the device first, then insert the USB receiver into the USB-C to USB receiver. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.

reviews.title: Loud click, nice feel on your fingers, good for small hands
reviews.text:
Pros:
- Material on your hands feels silky. Great feel.
- Scroll wheel works nicely.
- Tracking is fine.
- Battery rather than recharge, which I like because all of the recharging ones die within a year
- On/Off switch to save your battery
- Excellent for smaller hands. I wear women's gloves size S, and this fits my hands really well.

Cons:
- The click. I have a thing with clicks. It's maddening to hear yourself click loudly all day. If the click were silent, this would be the perfect mouse. Maybe I'm a little neurotic, but it's distracting for me.

Neutral:
- The LED light near your thumb is small. I don't know why so many of mice have light strips. It seems like something else to use up the battery. I'd prefer to not have any lights, outside of what's necessary underneath for a track light. Not a big deal, and better than most.

Other:
- Made In China
- 6D Optical Mouse
- Takes 2 AAA Batteries

title: Neises Ergonomic Mouse, Bluetooth Mouse for ipad,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Air/Mac/MacBook Pro/Mini/ipad Pro/iMac/Laptop,Rechargeable Wireless Mouse for MacBook Air/MacBook pro Chromebook Laptop PC
description:
Tip:Scientific ergonomic design maintains healthy wrist and arm positions to achieve smoother movement and reduce overall stress.
How to use it:
A. 2.4Ghz Mode:
Switch to "ON/OFF" button to right.And Plug the receiver into the USB port or use a USB C adapter to plug into the type c port of your computer, Then you can use the mouse in 2.4GHz Mode.
B. Bluetooth Mode:
Switch on Bluetooth on your device and power on the mouse. Press the DPI Button or Press Left,Roller and Right 3 Buttons together for 5 seconds.When the mouse name coming up on the device.Click it and it will be connected.
Note:
System Requirement: Windows 8/10, Android 4.2 and above,Mac & IOS 10.10(Compatiable with 4.2BLE、4.1BLE、4.0BLE or earlier)
Package Included:
1* Dual Mode Mouse
1* Charging Cable
1*USB Receiver (under earth the mouse)
1*Type C Adapter
Note:
1. It's out of power if the mouse cursor moves slowly or stop moving. Please recharge it. Note: Please do not charge the mouse with mobile phone charger.
2. Please charge the mouse for 2 hours before the first time to use it. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.
3. Not all computers support two modes. For example, Win 7 system does not support Bluetooth mode.
4. There is memory function on Bluetooth Type Mouse.When the mouse has connected another device,and now you would like connect the device not connected with the mouse last time, it should re-connect with the device.
5. If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.
features: 【2022 Latest Upgrade Optical Ergonomic Design】Reduce the overall pressure on the hand, specially designed for long-term use of the mouse, providing a more comfortable way to use.

And finally, the color-changing light bar is kinda sexy. A bargain at the price.

⭐【Silent Click & Adjustable Quick Response Function】The left and right button mute processing design reduces 90% of noise. It is an ideal mouse for offices, libraries and other places where quiet is required. 3-Level adjustable DPI among 1000, 1200 and 1600 to meet different needs.

⭐【2023 Latest Upgrade Ergonomic Design】Ergonomic Design, Slim lightweight Comfortable Cordless Mice and convenient for carrying.(Warranty Service: Vxeei provides 24-hour online service, if you have any questions, please feel free to contact us)

⭐【Compatibility】2.4GHz mode works with laptop, desktop or any devices with USB port or type-c port, Just plug in the USB receiver to play directly. Bluetooth mode works with Windows/ Android/ MAC OS system. Note: BT5.1system Requirement: Windows 8.0, Windows 10 or later; MacOSX 10.10 or later; iPad OS 13 or later/ Android 5.0 or later. Please check or update the operating system before use.
